description: A capsule shape (rectangle with fully rounded ends); use 'fill' or 'stroke' to apply color.

style.description: End cap style; 'continuous' gives squircle-style ends; default 'circular'

fill.description: Fill color/style string; takes priority over stroke

stroke.description: Stroke color/style string; ignored when fill is set

strokeLineWidth.description: Stroke line width in points; default 1.0
